command:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/n8n_bridge jose@192.168.0.205 bash -s << 'ENDSSH'
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai
export PATH="$PATH:/home/jose/.local/bin"
echo '=IMPORT CHECK='
python3 -c "
import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'.')
import runtime.moreno_wave1_reliability as w
print('wave1 module OK, version:', w.WAVE1_VERSION)
import runtime.moreno_governed_executor as e
print('executor OK, has wave1 bg:', hasattr(e, '_run_background_governed_phase_wave1'))
print('executor OK, has wave1 start:', hasattr(e, '_start_governed_phase_wave1'))
print('executor OK, has wave1 build:', hasattr(e, 'build_executor_actions_wave1'))
import runtime.moreno_operator_bridge as b
print('bridge OK')
"
echo '=WAVE1 TESTS='
python3 -m pytest tests/test_wave1_reliability.py -v 2>&1
ENDSSH
